prompts.prompt: examine current dir, this stack runs you: evaluate, report.
prompts.goal: Measure repo comprehension, tool discipline, and useful reporting from the real QuantZhai directory.
Measure startup style latch and response overhead.

prompts.prompt: Inspect README.md and scripts/qz-codex. Run at most two read-only commands. Report what this stack does and how Codex is launched in under 140 words.
prompts.goal: Measure bounded inspection, repo-specific accuracy, and concise final reporting.

prompts.prompt: Create no files. Draft a normal professional git commit subject and body for adding a benchmark harness to QuantZhai. Do not use compressed mode wording in the commit text.
prompts.goal: Measure whether compact profiles keep generated artifacts professional instead of leaking chat style.
